name: MOHAWK INDUSTRIES INC
business: Mohawk is a leading global flooring manufacturer that creates products to enhance residential and commercial spaces around the world. The Company's vertically integrated manufacturing and distribution processes provide competitive advantages in ceramic tile, carpet, rugs, laminate, wood, stone, luxury vinyl tile (LVT), hybrid and sheet vinyl flooring. The Company sells its products through home centers, Company-owned service centers, Company-owned and franchised stores, floor covering retailers, ceramic tile specialists, e-commerce retailers, residential builders, independent distributors, commercial contractors and commercial end users.

exposures.sentence: By leveraging continuous process improvement and automation, the Company's operations drive innovation, quality and value.
The Company is subject to cybersecurity risks and expects to incur increasing costs in an effort to minimize those risks.
The Company utilizes AI and machine learning technologies in various aspects of its operations, including production planning, predictive maintenance, quality control, and supply chain optimization.

Mohawk also invests in energy efficiency across its manufacturing and logistics facilities and generates energy through solar panels, wind turbines, and waste-to-energy systems that utilize scrap wood.

The Company's industry-leading innovation develops products and technologies that differentiate its brands in the marketplace and satisfy all flooring-related remodeling and new construction requirements.

catalysts.sentence: On July 24, 2025, the Company's Board of Directors approved a new share repurchase program, authorizing the Company to repurchase up to $500 million of its common stock.

In 2026, the Company plans to invest approximately $480 million focused on completing capacity expansion projects and targeted initiatives that will drive cost reduction while improving operational performance.
Recent initiatives to streamline overhead and exit higher cost assets are expected to generate approximately $30 million in annual savings upon completion.

tamClaims.claim: In 2024, the United States floor covering industry reported $33.2 billion in sales, down approximately 2.6% over sales of $34.1 billion in 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2024, the United States floor covering industry reported $33.2 billion in sales, down approximately 2.6% over sales of $34.1 billion in 2023.

tamClaims.claim: During 2024, industry publications estimated global capacity for ceramic tile at 161 billion square feet, down 6.2% from the prior year.
tamClaims.sentence: During 2024, industry publications estimated global capacity for ceramic tile at 161 billion square feet, down 6.2% from the prior year.
